payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board Meeting action items for November 18, 2024, including CBDTP toll rate schedule phase-in, board meeting minutes from October 30, 2024, procurement actions, and real estate items

evidence_refs.source_quote: November 2024
MTA Board Action Items
2 Broadway 20th Floor Boardroom New York, NY 10004 Monday, 11/18/2024 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM ET

payload.description: Board approval of phase-in feature for CBD Charge Schedule: Phase 1 (2025-2027) at 60% of adopted rates, Phase 2 (2028-2030) at 80%, Phase 3 (starting 2031) at full March 2024 adopted rates

evidence_refs.source_quote: To obtain the Board's approval of the annexed Resolution which will (i) endorse and adopt a phase-in feature to the toll rate schedule

Under the phase-in approach, the CBDTP would be implemented in three steps... Phase 1 (2025, 2026, and 2027) equaling 60%... Phase 2 (2028, 2029 and 2030), the toll and credit rates would equal 80%... March 2024 adopted toll rates would come into full effect in 2031

evidence_refs.source_quote: 2 Broadway 20th Floor Boardroom New York, NY 10004 Monday, 11/18/2024 11:00 AM - 1:00 PM ET

payload.description: Approved minutes of the October 2024 MTA Regular Board meeting

evidence_refs.source_quote: Regular Board Meeting Minutes October 30, 2024 9:00 a.m.
the Board approved the Joint Minutes of the MTA and MTA Agencies Regular Board meeting held on September 25, 2024

tool_args.label: Governor Hochul announce CBDTP phase-in proposal

payload.description: Governor Hochul announced a proposal to proceed with the CBDTP with phased-in toll rates over several years

evidence_refs.source_quote: On November 14, 2024, Governor Hochul announced a proposal to proceed with the CBDTP, but with the toll structure and rates... being phased-in gradually over several years

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: Planned implementation of the CBD Charge Schedule phase-in commencing in or about January 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: If approved, the phase-in of the CBD Charge Schedule... is planned for implementation... commencing in or about January 2025

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: New York State announced pause in CBDTP implementation

payload.description: New York State announced a pause in implementation of the CBDTP

evidence_refs.source_quote: On June 5, 2024, before the filing with the Secretary of State of the CBD Charge Schedule, New York State announced a pause in implementation of the CBDTP.

tool_args.label: Governor Hochul announce CBDTP phase-in proposal

payload.description: Governor Hochul announced a proposal to proceed with the CBDTP with phased-in toll rates over several years
Planned implementation of the CBD Charge Schedule phase-in commencing in or about January 2025
MTA issued a Request for Proposals for preliminary design and environmental assessment of the Interborough Express

evidence_refs.source_quote: just yesterday MTA issued a Request for Proposals for preliminary design and environmental assessment

tool_args.label: CBDTP to generate $15 billion for capital projects

payload.claim_text: Adoption of the phase-in feature of the CBD Charge Schedule is in keeping with TBTA's statutory mandate to implement the CBDTP, among other things, so as to generate enough net annual revenue over time to fund $15 billion for MTA's transit and commuter rail system capital projects, as required by law.
payload.subject: CBDTP

evidence_refs.source_quote: generate enough net annual revenue over time to fund $15 billion for MTA's transit and commuter rail system capital projects

payload.claim_text: The MTA has seen a major increase in ridership, hitting milestones like 4 million riders on Fridays and being on track to hit 1 billion riders in 2024 — a huge recovery from the pandemic lows.
payload.subject: MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA has seen a major increase in ridership, hitting milestones like 4 million riders on Fridays and being on track to hit 1 billion riders in 2024

payload.claim_text: Paratransit services have seen significant growth, surpassing pre-COVID levels, which is a notable achievement for the MTA.
payload.subject: MTA Paratransit

evidence_refs.source_quote: Paratransit services have seen significant growth, surpassing pre-COVID levels

payload.claim_text: Savings of $400 million in operating costs. The goal is to push this savings to $500 million next year without reducing service or laying off workers.
payload.subject: MTA operating costs

evidence_refs.source_quote: savings of $400 million in operating costs. The goal is to push this savings to $500 million next year

payload.claim_text: IBX project will connect communities along a 14-mile stretch and provide 17 subway line connections at 19 different stations. The IBX project will change the optionality of the five million people living in Brooklyn and Queens.
payload.subject: Interborough Express

evidence_refs.source_quote: IBX project will connect communities along a 14-mile stretch and provide 17 subway line connections at 19 different stations

payload.raw_value_text: realized fuel savings of $139,000 over the previous year, which if extrapolated over the heating season, would be $411,000
payload.description: Realized fuel savings from Runwise boiler management system at 7 initial locations

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA collected data on fuel savings for seven locations for two to three months of the heating season, which led to a realized fuel savings of $139,000 over the previous year, which if extrapolated over the heating season, would be $411,000

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.raw_value_text: Subtracting the Runwise cost of $169,000 for these seven locations from $411,000 will result in a net savings of $242,000 or 43 percent over the heating season
payload.description: Net savings after subtracting Runwise costs for 7 locations

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subtracting the Runwise cost of $169,000 for these seven locations from $411,000 will result in a net savings of $242,000 or 43 percent over the heating season

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Runwise estimated savings for 38 additional locations

payload.raw_value_text: savings over the heating season is conservatively estimated at 25 percent, which would equate to a net savings of $903,000 in Year 1, and $1,079,000 in Year 2
payload.description: Conservative estimated net savings for 38 added locations in Year 1 after subtracting Runwise costs

evidence_refs.source_quote: For the 38 added locations, savings over the heating season is conservatively estimated at 25 percent, which would equate to a net savings of $903,000 in Year 1

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Runwise estimated savings for 38 locations Year 2

payload.description: Conservative estimated net savings for 38 added locations in Year 2 and beyond after subtracting Runwise cost

evidence_refs.source_quote: $1,079,000 in Year 2 and beyond after subtracting the Runwise cost

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.
